positive: A vibrant, maximalist botanical pattern featuring stylized jungle flora and fauna, such as oversized monstera leaves, curling ferns, geometric hibiscus flowers, and abstract tropical birds. The composition should be a seamless, repeating tessellation designed for fabric printing. Use a bold, modern, Alphonse Mucha-inspired linework mixed with clean pop art colors. Dominant colors should be deep emerald green, turquoise blue, sunny yellow, and vibrant magenta, contrasted with clean white outlines. The overall feel must be highly decorative, high contrast, and immediately readable as a repeating surface pattern. Studio shot, vector art, ink wash texture, flat graphic design, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, messy, noisy, text, watermark, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, photo, realistic photography, gradient, poor quality, grayscale
